message:
test(engine): massive integration test expansion across 30 test files —
frankentui adapter, runtime diagnostics CLI, sibling benchmark gate,
npm compatibility matrix, execution waves, and many more (+5876 lines)

Largest new/expanded test suites:
- frankentui_adapter.rs (+1431 lines): comprehensive TUI adapter
  integration tests covering widget rendering, input handling, event
  dispatch, state synchronization, and terminal dimension edge cases
- runtime_diagnostics_cli.rs (+979 lines): CLI integration tests for
  all diagnostic subcommands including memory snapshots, extension
  health probes, lease status queries, GC metric collection, and batch
  diagnostic output formatting
- sibling_integration_benchmark_gate.rs (+921 lines): sibling crate
  benchmark gate validation covering cross-crate dependency scenarios,
  performance regression detection, and gate verdict determinism
- npm_compatibility_matrix_integration.rs (+541 lines): expanded
  cohort-based compatibility campaign tests with additional package
  priority tiers, incompatibility severity classification, and
  remediation workflow tracking
- rgc_execution_waves_integration.rs (+457 lines): execution wave
  coordination tests covering wave scheduling, inter-wave dependency
  ordering, and resource budget enforcement across wave boundaries
- plas_lockstep_integration.rs (+357 lines): PLAS lockstep integration
  covering deterministic replay synchronization, divergence detection,
  and evidence snapshot comparison
- plas_burn_in_gate_integration.rs (+347 lines): burn-in gate tests
  for soak-test duration enforcement, flake detection, and promotion
  threshold validation
- benchmark_e2e_enrichment_integration.rs (+298 lines): enriched
  benchmark E2E tests with harness contract validation, environment
  manifest round-trips, and fairness policy enforcement

Other expanded suites:
- shadow_ablation_engine.rs (+255 lines refactored)
- proof_specialization_linkage_integration.rs (+150 lines)
- rgc_test_harness_integration.rs (+131 lines)
- parser_multi_engine_harness_integration.rs (+75 lines)
- ifc_declassification_runtime.rs (+53 lines)
- hook_effect_contract_integration.rs (+25 lines)
- stdlib_integration.rs (+168 lines refactored)
- plas_release_gate_integration.rs (+15 lines)
- deterministic_replay_integration.rs (+14 lines)
- receipt_verifier_pipeline.rs (+13 lines)
- obstruction_certificate_integration.rs (+13 lines)
- static_semantics_integration.rs (+10 lines)
- wave_handoff_contract_integration.rs (+88 lines refactored)
- bulkhead_integration.rs (+6 lines)
- interleaving_explorer_integration.rs (+5 lines)
- runtime_hotspot_optimization_campaign.rs (+5 lines)
- runtime_observability.rs (+4 lines)
- plas_release_gate_enrichment_integration.rs (+4 lines)
- governance_hooks_enrichment_integration.rs (-4 lines cleanup)
- specialization_conformance_integration.rs (+19 lines)
- execution_cell_integration.rs (+2 lines)
- parser_third_party_rerun_kit.rs (+4 lines)
